merge_gen_region: /// Creates STS Options from a JSON string. The JSON schema is as follows: /// { /// "title": "STS Credentials Config", /// "type": "object", /// "required": ["token_exchange_service_uri", "subject_token_path", /// "subject_token_type"], /// "properties": { /// "token_exchange_service_uri": { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "resource": { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "audience": { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "scope": { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "requested_token_type": { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "subject_token_path": { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "subject_token_type": { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "actor_token_path" : { /// "type": "string" /// }, /// "actor_token_type": { /// "type": "string" /// } /// } /// } grpc::Status StsCredentialsOptionsFromJson(const std::string& json_string, StsCredentialsOptions* options);
